  "findings": [
    "Inadequate ventilation clearance around the dry-type transformer, violating manufacturer specifications and NEC requirements."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt further installation and wiring of the transformer.",
    "Reposition the transformer to meet the minimum clearance distances specified on the manufacturer nameplate and design drawings.",
    "Verify clearance compliance before resuming electrical terminations."
  ],
  "rationale": "The dry-type transformer is being installed with inadequate ventilation clearance, which poses a severe overheating and fire hazard. According to NEC Art. 450.9, ventilation must be sufficient to dispose of the transformer's full-load losses. Work cannot proceed to termination or energization until the physical clearance defect is corrected.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Art. 450.9",
    "NEC Art. 450.21"
  ]
}
